📡 StackRadar

dagstermedium

1.13.5 (core) / 0.29.5 (libraries)

May 14, 2026

Release 1.13.5 addresses several issues related to job backfills, asset checks, and UI improvements, enhancing the overall stability and usability of Dagster.

  • SqliteEventLogStorage: Increased default busy_timeout from 5s to 30s
  • dagster-k8s: Added delete_job_on_completion flag
  • dagstermill: Dropped support for papermill 1.x
bug-fixenhancement
dagsterlow

1.13.4 (core) / 0.29.4 (libraries)

May 14, 2026

Release 1.13.4 introduces several enhancements and bug fixes that improve the usability and functionality of Dagster.

  • Added support for typing.Mapping and typing.Sequence annotations
  • Introduced path_prefix parameter to DagsterGraphQLClient
featuretyping-improvement
dbt-corelow

dbt-core v1.10.21

May 14, 2026

This release addresses a specific issue with Docker OS dependency installation, ensuring smoother integration for users relying on Docker environments.

  • Fixed issue with Docker OS dependency installation
  • Capped dbt-adapters version to <1.24 to prevent a KeyError
docker-integrationdependency-update
dbt-corelow

dbt-core v1.11.10

May 14, 2026

The dbt-core v1.11.10 release addresses compatibility issues with dbt-adapters integration.

  • Pinned dbt-adapters to <1.24 to avoid breaking changes
  • Ensures stability for downstream consumers relying on dbt-core and dbt-adapters integration
dependency-update
dbt-corecritical

dbt-core v1.9.1

Apr 6, 2026

Critical security fix addressing authentication bypass vulnerability in dbt Cloud integration.

  • Fixed RCE vulnerability in macro execution
  • Updated authentication flow for dbt Cloud
securitybug-fix
